description: MCP server for Huly — manage projects, issues, documents and more via natural language.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.varaprasadreddy9676/huly-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Huly workspace token — get from huly.app DevTools → Application → Local Storage → token
environmentVariables.name: HULY_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Your Huly workspace slug (the part after huly.app/ in your URL, e.g. 'myteam')
environmentVariables.name: HULY_WORKSPACE

environmentVariables.description: Optional — set to https://front.huly.app to enable reading document content
environmentVariables.name: HULY_FRONT_URL
